title: Rafael B. Andrist
text: Home * People * Rafael B. Andrist Rafael Benedikt Andrist , a Swiss computer scientist and mathematician affiliated with the University of Wuppertal [1] . In 2011, he defended his Ph.D. thesis on Topics in Complex Geometry at University of Bern . Rafael B. Andrist is author of the chess program Wilhelm , which knows about corresponding squares in pawn endgames with completly blocked pawns, and solves the Lasker-Reichhelm Position instantly [2] [3] . It further utilizes Endgame Tablebases to build statistics and to search for special features.
